transcript.text:
[Tzuyang's parents' home] I'm going to start recording now
[Live stream ON] Hello~
Hello everyone~ For today,
I have some fried chicken
This is from "1st St. Fried Chicken" located in Nogyang-dong, Uijeongbu
The owner from here is ill with a very rare case of cancer
And I heard that he's going through a tough time and even went through multiple surgeries
So much worse now because of covid too
They also deliver, so please try this if you're from the area
And also if you're hungry
Please show support
[6.3 million small business owners' day goes by like this]
[Owners] Hello, (Messes up) Sorry
Hello, we run a small chicken restaurant in Nogyang-dong
Choi Misung, Jung Woosin
He used to be a truck driver

He's been getting sick
A friend recommended us to open a business
for his own health as a head of the household
Covid happened and it worsened
We saw Tzuyang's video lending help for small business owners
So we made a submission
We got lucky enough to get picked
[My husband was diagnosed with liposarcoma when we were dating]
[I decided to marry him and have a kid at the age of 26] [Since then, 3 recurrences and 5 intestinal adhesions have been performed]
We sold our truck that we have been driving for 8 years
And got a loan through what we had from the truck
I said "Don't worry, everything will be okay"
But I was actually worried
I thought we would be okay after covid 2.5 level
But it was still the same
We need to get healthier, but we're afraid that we'll get even more sick because of this

Even now too Of course we're sad if our business doesn't do well
But I just don't want my husband to stop stressing
There are days we don't sell any chicken at all
So we hand out flyers
We get so cold because it's Winter
And I think to myself:
"She shouldn't be doing this right now"
"She's going through all this because she married the wrong person"
As I hand out those flyers, I think to myself:
"I handed out flyers, but what if we don't get any customers? My husband will be disappointed"
I'm always just worried about him
[Live stream ON]
Hello
I'm going to start mukbang in like an hour
[Chat: Are you a good driver?]
No, I'm a beginner

[Tzuyang is coming to meet them] Since Tzuyang can't physically be here,
How about we interact through AfreecaTV? (streaming platform)
[Watching her stream]
Let's head out
[Let's go meet them] There's no one out in the streets
[Where is she going?]
[Searching]
[That looks familiar]
[Someone's here!]
It's Tzuyang!!
It's Tzuyang! Oh my
Is she really here?
Hello!
I was just thinking you were going somewhere, but not here
Can I make a to-go order?
My mind is blank right now

I was totally not ready for this
I'm going to cry
I want to order take-out
How many do I need? Is this 1 chicken? That's big!
Give me everything here All of them
Everything Okay, thank you!
[1 box of fried chicken]
Thank you No no~
Thank you for the food
I need to carry it for you
This is a lot of food
I'll eat this for my live mukbang
Thank you
Thank you! Good luck!
Take care!
[Watching her show]

Bon appetit
Can you see this?
That looks good
It's been so long since I had fried chicken
Delicious
Seasoned
Amazing
[Chat: Where is this from?]
1st St. Fried Chicken Located in Nogyang
It's good
[She's saying it's good]
She mentioned our restaurant
And also advertising old-style fried chicken
Even if it's not our restaurant, other owners can receive some support
Wow a delivery order
Someone must have ordered it while watching this

[Continuous orders]
[Wife comes to help]
It will take about 10 minutes
[Delivery man sits to wait]
We didn't have any delivery orders recently
[Another order]
Another one?
This is a miracle performed by Tzuyang
[What is she doing now?]
[Advertising their restaurant]
This is fried crab meat and fried shrimp
Yummy
Crab meat
Whelk! Should I try it?
This is no joke
He gave me a lot of noodles

This will be perfect with some beer
Tasty
[Forgot to fuel] I need something to drink
I have no coke Brother: Should I go buy?
No, it's okay
Mom: I'll go buy some Brother: It's close by
Fine, thank you
I forgot about the drinks
2 bottles I mean 3!
That's really good
Chicken breast
This is tasty too
The sauce has a very tasty sweet & spicy flavor
This can't go wrong
I should've bought her some plum juice
She makes me want to fry myself a chicken right now

I'm worried that the food got cold
Fried chicken is good even when it's cold
Coke is here
[A Joyful Ceremony]
[Chat: Tip your brother for deliverying] Nope
This is it
This old, traditional style of fried chicken is very nice
How's this still so crispy?
[Soguem approaches]
Yum
[Who are you!?]
Glossy leg
[Are you eating by yourself again!?]
[I will get a bite]
Sogeum, wait!
[Then will you give me some?]

[Give it]
No,
It's mine
Check out the skin That's amazing
Looks delicious
Give me a second, Let me check if it's recording correctly
[Now!]
No!
[Tzuyang's mom to the rescue]
[Arrested for Attempted Theft]
The sauce is really tasty
Last one
It's tasty
And it's really big
They are pretty big for an old-style fried chicken
And the color is nice and golden

I will not do mukbang here at my parents' home anymore
I should have just eaten this at home
I'm sorry, but
I'll have to end the mukbang here
I can't possibly continue because of Sogeum
It's tiring
Everyone is going through hard times right now because of covid
I really hope we will stand back up together soon
And to fight against covid, let's all please to-go instead of dining in
I recommend all of us to eat at home with the family
Thanks everyone~
[I wish for a day all small business owners get to smile]
I went to my friend's wedding and I met her there
I saw her and asked my friend to introduce me to her
[Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
